assertions.title: Tokenlist URL input visible in form UI

steps.observed: Page loaded with Compare DEX Routers heading and form

steps.action: Look for tokenlist URL input field
steps.expected: Text input for custom tokenlist URL visible
steps.observed: Text input labeled 'Tokenlist URL (optional)' visible with placeholder 'https://tokens.uniswap.org', Load button, and Reset button

assertions.title: Custom tokenlist loads and updates autocomplete

steps.observed: URL filled in tokenlist URL input

steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown appears with USDC from custom list
steps.observed: Autocomplete dropdown shows USDC (USD Coin) with full 42-char contract address and logo

steps.action: Check localStorage after loading custom URL

steps.expected: Page reloads and restores custom URL
steps.observed: Page reloaded, URL input shows 'https://tokens.uniswap.org', status shows 'Loaded 1367 tokens from saved URL'
URL filled in tokenlist URL input
Status message shows 'Error: Failed to fetch remote URL: fetch failed' in red text

evidence.consoleErrors: 502 Bad Gateway for proxy request to invalid URL (expected behavior), plus favicon.ico 404 (cosmetic)

steps.observed: HTTP 200, Content-Type: application/json, 426623 bytes, parsed as JSON with name='Uniswap Labs Default' and 1367 tokens

evidence.curlOutput: HTTP_STATUS:200, CONTENT_TYPE:application/json, SIZE:426623, name: Uniswap Labs Default, tokens count: 1367

steps.action: Verify custom tokenlist URL is loaded (https://tokens.uniswap.org)
steps.expected: Custom URL visible in input with loaded status
steps.observed: URL input shows 'https://tokens.uniswap.org', status shows 'Loaded 1367 tokens from saved URL'

steps.expected: Custom URL cleared, default tokenlist restored
steps.observed: URL input cleared (empty), status shows 'Reset to default (1367 tokens)', Reset button hidden
Status shows 'Loaded 1367 tokens from saved URL'

steps.action: Clear From Token field and type 'USDC'
steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown shows tokens from custom list
steps.observed: Autocomplete dropdown appears with USDC (USD Coin) showing full 42-char contract address and USDC logo icon

frictions.description: Page auto-populates From/To token fields after tokenlist loads (USDC and WETH for Base chain), requiring triple-click+Backspace to clear before testing autocomplete. Not mentioned in user-testing.md.
frictions.resolution: Used clickCount:3 + Backspace to select-all and clear the From Token field before typing test input

frictions.description: Previously saved localStorage state from prior test runs persisted the custom tokenlist URL on page load. Had to account for pre-existing state.
frictions.resolution: Leveraged existing state for VAL-TLIST-003 test (persistence verification), then used Reset for fresh VAL-TLIST-002 test

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Custom tokenlist URL input is visible (VAL-TLIST-001), loads and updates autocomplete from https://tokens.uniswap.org (VAL-TLIST-002), persists in localStorage across page reloads (VAL-TLIST-003), shows clear error message for invalid URLs (VAL-TLIST-004), server proxy endpoint returns valid JSON (VAL-TLIST-005), reset clears localStorage and restores default tokenlist (VAL-TLIST-008), and autocomplete works with custom tokenlist tokens (VAL-CROSS-002).
